import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" interface AnimatedCircularProgressBarProps { max?: number min?: number value: number gaugePrimaryColor: string gaugeSecondaryColor: string className?: string } export function AnimatedCircularProgressBar({ max = 100, min = 0, value = 0, gaugePrimaryColor, gaugeSecondaryColor, className, }: AnimatedCircularProgressBarProps) { const circumference = 2 * Math.PI * 45 const percentPx = circumference / 100 const currentPercent = Math.round(((value - min) / (max - min)) * 100) return (
{currentPercent}
) }

visual_summary: An Animated Circular Progress Bar is a visually engaging UI component to display the progress of a task or process. It is useful when a precise, animated representation of the progress is required. Developers would use this component in scenarios where they need to provide a dynamic, attention-grabbing progress update.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready loader component with the following characteristics:

Name: Animated Circular Progress Bar
Description: An Animated Circular Progress Bar is a visually engaging UI component to display the progress of a task or process. It is useful when a precise, animated representation of the progress is required. Developers would use this component in scenarios where they need to provide a dynamic, attention-grabbing progress update.
Style: modern, flat, dynamic
Interactions: animated
Tags: progress, circular, animated, bar, UI

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
